label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which gift Eve ends up with after all the swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, each has a different colored present. Let me write down the starting gifts. Starting gifts: - Alice: yellow - Bob: orange ball - Claire: red - Dave: purple - Eve: green Now, there are five swaps happening in order. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Alice and Eve swap. So Alice gives her yellow to Eve, and Eve gives her green to Alice. After this swap: - Alice has green - Eve has yellow The others remain the same: Bob (orange), Claire (red), Dave (purple). Second swap: Bob and Dave swap. Bob has orange ball, Dave has purple. After swapping: - Bob now has purple - Dave now has orange ball Current state: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: red - Dave: orange - Eve: yellow Third swap: Bob and Eve swap. Bob has purple, Eve has yellow. After swapping: - Bob gets yellow - Eve gets purple Now: - Alice: green - Bob: yellow - Claire: red - Dave: orange - Eve: purple Fourth swap: Claire and Eve swap. Claire has red, Eve has purple. After swapping: - Claire gets purple - Eve gets red Now: - Alice: green - Bob: yellow - Claire: purple - Dave: orange - Eve: red Fifth swap: Dave and Alice swap. Dave has orange, Alice has green. After swapping: - Dave gets green - Alice gets orange Final state: - Alice: orange - Bob: yellow - Claire: purple - Dave: green - Eve: red Wait, so Eve ends up with the red present. But let me check again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Alice (yellow) <-> Eve (green). Correct. Second swap: Bob (orange) <-> Dave (purple). So Bob now has purple, Dave has orange. Correct. Third swap: Bob (purple) <-> Eve (yellow). Now Bob has yellow, Eve has purple. Correct. Fourth swap: Claire (red) <-> Eve (purple). Now Claire has purple, Eve has red.
